description: An appeal of an upheld determination — peer-to-peer, internal appeal, or external independent review (IRO). Records a fresh human re-determination that supersedes the appealed determination via appealOfRef; the original chain stays intact, since the appeal appends rather than rewrites history. The principal here is the re-determining authority — a different medical director for an internal appeal, or an external IRO reviewer for independent review, attributed through the verdict. This covers the appeals and peer-to-peer arc of the PA lifecycle. AGLedger notarizes the re-determination verdict; it does not render it.

appealOfRef.description: recordId of the halcyon-pa-determination-v1 (or a prior appeal) being appealed.

appealLevel.description: peer-to-peer = ordering MD vs payer MD; internal-appeal = payer's formal appeal; external-review = independent IRO.

newRecommendation.description: The appeal outcome. overturn = reverses the denial; uphold = sustains it; partial = modified.

reviewerRole.description: The re-determining authority's role (external-iro-physician for IRO independence).

denialBasis.description: Required when the appeal upholds the denial (CMS-0057-F).
